releaseNotes: Hardened account sync so favorites, reading history, watch history, and recent searches merge across Android and iPhone.
Bundled the Kokoro ONNX model inside the Android app so first-run narration no longer depends on a fragile model download.
Android narration now uses the real Kokoro ONNX engine instead of the device TTS estimate path.
Chapter and long-text narration now prepares continuous audio before playback to reduce the talk-and-pause rhythm.
Anime playback keeps Auto, Anineko, AnimePahe, and VidLink Pro available, with Anineko/provider pages opening inside the app when direct stream extraction fails.
Anime episode lists are de-duplicated and sorted for a cleaner episode order.
Movie, cartoon, K-drama, and anime playback can open embed/provider players in-app instead of failing when a direct stream is unavailable.
DramaCool and KimCartoon source servers now fall back to their source episode pages when direct extraction is unavailable.
